title: crepidomanes africanum
intro: Crepidomanes africanum, also known as the African creeping fern, is a type of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crepidomanes africanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and even exhibit antifungal and antibacterial activities. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and may also be used in the form of a paste or ointment for topical application.
